sessionStart.powershell: $d=if($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA){$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}else{Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.copilot\plugins\quota-statusline'};$ok=Join-Path $d 'setup.v1.1.0.done';if(Test-Path $ok){exit 0};New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $d|Out-Null;$ps1=Join-Path $d 'statusline.ps1';$cmd=Join-Path $d 'statusline.cmd';[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($ps1,[Convert]::FromBase64String(''));$q=[char]34;$c='@echo off'+[char]10+'powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File '+$q+$ps1+$q;[IO.File]::WriteAllText($cmd,$c,[System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII);$cp=Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.copilot\config.json';$cfg=if(Test-Path $cp){Get-Content $cp -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json}else{[PSCustomObject]@{}};$ch=$false;if(-not($cfg.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'experimental')){$cfg|Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name 'experimental' -Value $true;$ch=$true};if(-not($cfg.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'statusLine')){$cfg|Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name 'statusLine' -Value([PSCustomObject]@{type='command';command=$cmd;intervalSeconds=30});$ch=$true};if($ch){$cfg|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10|Set-Content $cp -Encoding UTF8};'done'|Set-Content $ok
sessionStart.bash: if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[quota-statusline] Run pwsh setup manually - see README for Mac/Linux instructions'; else echo '[quota-statusline] PowerShell (pwsh) required. See README.'; fi
